goal: Proposals foundation — bootstrap agent home, harvest ~/agents, consult DeepSeek, Mac archive dirs
commands: cd ~/Desktop/ogz-knowledge && git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main
cd ~/Desktop/ogz-proposals && python3 scripts/agent_kit/bootstrap_home.py PROPOSALS 2>/dev/null || python3 ~/Desktop/ogz-knowledge/scripts/agent_kit/bootstrap_home.py PROPOSALS

cd ~/Desktop/ogz-knowledge && python3 scripts/consult.py "Review OGZ Agent Kit foundation in docs/AGENT_KIT.md: Drive+Mac archive, harvest proposals from ~/agents, append-only events/learnings. What is missing before first Slides output?" || true

cd ~/Desktop/ogz-knowledge && python3 scripts/agent_kit/log_event.py --agent PROPOSALS --type harvested --summary "Foundation harvest from ~/agents" --artifacts "{\"mac_home\":\"~/Desktop/ogz-proposals\"}"
